violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed numerous food items in coolers not dated marked. Ex diced tomatoes, diced onions, shredded lettuce.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed grease dripping from the hood system during the inspection.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No test strips available at time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed loose hanging debris on the ceiling. Also the floor in numerous place in the kitchen were damaged and missing.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters in hood system need to washed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Grease on walls/floor area all clean in place equipment and cooking area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Walls had missing pieces of sheetrock in dishwashing area. Floor tiles missing through out the kitchen and dishwashing area.
